sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: AES Indiana powers up 250-MW solar farm with 180-MWh BESS
feed.summary: AES Indiana has energized a 250-MW solar farm that includes a 180-MWh battery energy storage system (BESS). The project aims to provide sustainable energy to the region and enhance grid stability. This initiative marks a significant step in the utility's commitment to renewable energy deployment.

feed.title: TotalEnergies Marketing India Hosts Annual Distributor Convention to Unveil Future Growth Strategy
feed.summary: TotalEnergies Marketing India Private Limited (TEMIPL) held its annual lubricants distributor convention in Hyderabad, India, gathering 200 distributors and partners. The company unveiled its 2026 strategic roadmap, focusing on strengthening its distribution network, launching new products, and recognizing distributor excellence. This strategy aims to drive sustainable growth and innovation in the Indian automotive aftermarket, emphasizing the crucial role of distributors in the company's success.
